001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.historyLog;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.HistoryLogProps;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
006
007/**
008 * CGM Rise Rate Alert (RRA) settings change history log entry.
009 *
010 * Fields parsed from the decompiled CgmGlucoseAlertSettingsModel:
011 *   alertLevel   (raw[10-11]): uint16 - the rise rate threshold value (mg/dL/min)
012 *   repeatDuration (raw[12-13]): uint16 - repeat alert duration in minutes
013 *   isEnabled    (raw[14]):    boolean - whether the alert is enabled
014 *   modifiedField (raw[16-17]): uint16 - which field was changed:
015 *                               0=ENABLE, 1=THRESHOLD, 2=DURATION, 3=INVALID
016 */
017@HistoryLogProps(
018    opCode = 167,
019    displayName = "CGM RRA Settings",
020    internalName = "LID_CGM_RRA_SETTINGS"
021)
022public class CgmRraSettingsHistoryLog extends HistoryLog {
023
024    private int alertLevel;
025    private int repeatDuration;
026    private boolean isEnabled;
027    private int modifiedField;
028
029    public CgmRraSettingsHistoryLog() {}
030    public CgmRraSettingsHistoryLog(long pumpTimeSec, long sequenceNum, int alertLevel, int repeatDuration, boolean isEnabled, int modifiedField) {
031        super(pumpTimeSec, sequenceNum);
032        this.cargo = buildCargo(pumpTimeSec, sequenceNum, alertLevel, repeatDuration, isEnabled, modifiedField);
033        this.alertLevel = alertLevel;
034        this.repeatDuration = repeatDuration;
035        this.isEnabled = isEnabled;
036        this.modifiedField = modifiedField;
037    }
038
039    public CgmRraSettingsHistoryLog(int alertLevel, int repeatDuration, boolean isEnabled, int modifiedField) {
040        this(0, 0, alertLevel, repeatDuration, isEnabled, modifiedField);
041    }
042
043    public int typeId() {
044        return 167;
045    }
046
047    /**
048     * <table border="1">
049     * <caption>Parsed fields for CgmRraSettingsHistoryLog:</caption>
050     * <tr><td><code>alertLevel</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 10)</code></td></tr>
051     * <tr><td><code>repeatDuration</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 12)</code></td></tr>
052     * <tr><td><code>isEnabled</code></td><td><code>raw[14] != 0</code></td></tr>
053     * <tr><td><code>modifiedField</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 16)</code></td></tr>
054     * </table>
055     */
056    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
057        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == 26);
058        this.cargo = raw;
059        parseBase(raw);
060        this.alertLevel = Bytes.readShort(raw, 10);
061        this.repeatDuration = Bytes.readShort(raw, 12);
062        this.isEnabled = raw[14] != 0;
063        this.modifiedField = Bytes.readShort(raw, 16);
064    }
065
066    public static byte[] buildCargo(long pumpTimeSec, long sequenceNum, int alertLevel, int repeatDuration, boolean isEnabled, int modifiedField) {
067        return HistoryLog.fillCargo(Bytes.combine(
068            new byte[]{(byte) 167, 0},
069            Bytes.toUint32(pumpTimeSec),
070            Bytes.toUint32(sequenceNum),
071            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(alertLevel),
072            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(repeatDuration),
073            new byte[]{(byte) (isEnabled ? 1 : 0), 0},
074            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(modifiedField)));
075    }
076
077    /**
078     * @return the rise rate alert threshold value (mg/dL/min)
079     */
080    public int getAlertLevel() {
081        return alertLevel;
082    }
083
084    /**
085     * @return the repeat alert duration in minutes
086     */
087    public int getRepeatDuration() {
088        return repeatDuration;
089    }
090
091    /**
092     * @return whether the rise rate alert is enabled
093     */
094    public boolean getIsEnabled() {
095        return isEnabled;
096    }
097
098    /**
099     * @return which field was modified: 0=ENABLE, 1=THRESHOLD, 2=DURATION, 3=INVALID
100     */
101    public int getModifiedField() {
102        return modifiedField;
103    }
104
105    public enum ModifiedField {
106        ENABLE(0),
107        THRESHOLD(1),
108        DURATION(2),
109        INVALID(3),
110        ;
111
112        final int id;
113        ModifiedField(int id) {
114            this.id = id;
115        }
116
117        public static ModifiedField fromId(int id) {
118            for (ModifiedField f : values()) {
119                if (f.id == id) {
120                    return f;
121                }
122            }
123            return INVALID;
124        }
125    }
126
127    public ModifiedField getModifiedFieldEnum() {
128        return ModifiedField.fromId(modifiedField);
129    }
130}
